# Third-order Intensity?

```{r}
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Third-order comparison for equilateral configurations
# ------------------------------------------------------------

g3_lgcp_eq <- function(r, phi, sL) {
  c <- log(1 + phi)
  exp(3 * c * exp(-r / sL))
}

g3_cscp_eq <- function(r, phi, sC) {
  1 + 3 * phi * exp(-2 * r / sC) +
    2 * sqrt(2) * phi^(3/2) * exp(-3 * r / sC)
}

# choose parameters
phi <- 1
sC  <- 0.05
sL  <- 0.68 * sC   # or your best matched LGCP scale

r_grid <- seq(0, 0.25, length.out = 1000)

g3_df <- tibble(
  r = rep(r_grid, 2),
  g3 = c(
    g3_cscp_eq(r_grid, phi = phi, sC = sC),
    g3_lgcp_eq(r_grid, phi = phi, sL = sL)
  ),
  model = rep(c("CSCP", "LGCP"), each = length(r_grid))
)

ggplot(g3_df, aes(x = r, y = g3, colour = model, linetype = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "r",
    y = expression(g[3](r, r, r)),
    title = expression("Third-order comparison for equilateral triples")
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

Difference directly

```{r}
diff_df <- tibble(
  r = r_grid,
  diff = g3_lgcp_eq(r_grid, phi = phi, sL = sL) -
         g3_cscp_eq(r_grid, phi = phi, sC = sC)
)

ggplot(diff_df, aes(x = r, y = diff)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "r",
    y = "LGCP - CSCP",
    title = "Difference in equilateral third-order product densities"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```
